caption: The video captures a presentation at the DPSI Midyear Workshop, featuring Sara M. Watson, a Fellow at the Berkman Center for Internet & Society. Sara stands confidently in front of a large screen displaying the title "What we talk about when we talk about data." She holds a tablet and appears to be engaging with her audience, possibly explaining or elaborating on the topic. The setting suggests an academic or professional environment, with attendees seated and attentively listening. The focus is on the discussion of data, likely exploring its implications, uses, and significance in today's digital age. The atmosphere seems interactive, with Sara actively involved in delivering her insights and knowledge to the participants.
